title: Email Template Manager
infoBanner: This template will be used as default for all email communications
subjectHint: This subject will be pre-filled when sending emails
bodyHint: This message will be pre-filled when sending emails. Salesmen can edit it before sending.
tip1: Keep the message professional and concise
tip2: Salesmen can customize this template before sending
tip3: The PDF attachment will be added automatically
tip4: Changes take effect immediately for all users
